# Versatile Home Solutions

> Locally-owned home improvement contractor based in the Annapolis Valley, Nova Scotia. Specializes in metal roofing, vinyl and metal siding, insulation, custom decks, sheds and outbuildings, fence installation, and luxury vinyl plank flooring. GAF-certified, fully insured, with up to 50-year materials warranties.

## Service Area

Annapolis Valley and surrounding Nova Scotia communities, Windsor through Digby. Includes Wolfville, Kentville, New Minas, Berwick, Middleton, Bridgetown, Annapolis Royal, Greenwood, Kingston, Lawrencetown, Coldbrook, Centreville, Canning, Hantsport, Port Williams, Waterville, Windsor, and Digby.

## Services

- [Roofing, Siding & Insulation](https://versatilehomesolutions.ca/services/metal-roofing): GAF-certified metal and shingle roofing, vinyl/metal siding, fascia, soffit, eavestroughs, blow-in attic insulation, solar-ready roof upgrades, free annual drone inspections.
- [Decks](https://versatilehomesolutions.ca/services/decks): Custom-built decks in pressure-treated, cedar, and composite materials. Single-level, multi-level, with optional pergolas, railings, stairs, and built-in seating.
- [Sheds & Outbuildings](https://versatilehomesolutions.ca/services/sheds-outbuildings): Storage sheds, workshops, greenhouses, catios, and animal shelters. Custom sizes from compact garden sheds to large workshops.
- [Fences](https://versatilehomesolutions.ca/services/fences): Pressure-treated wood, cedar, vinyl, chain link, and ornamental metal fencing. Privacy, semi-private, and decorative styles in 4ft, 6ft, and 8ft heights.
- [LVP Flooring](https://versatilehomesolutions.ca/services/lvp-flooring): Luxury vinyl plank installation. Waterproof, scratch-resistant, wood-look interior flooring with professional install over existing surfaces.

## Key Pages

- [About](https://versatilehomesolutions.ca/about): Company background, values, and local commitment.
- [Service Area](https://versatilehomesolutions.ca/service-area): Detailed map of communities served.
- [Process](https://versatilehomesolutions.ca/process): How estimates, planning, and project execution work.
- [Careers](https://versatilehomesolutions.ca/careers): Open positions and benefits for tradespeople and apprentices.
- [Contact](https://versatilehomesolutions.ca/contact): Free estimate request form and direct phone line.
